calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:12am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Hongyang Ai appears in pro per with an interpreter who was duly sworn. Respondent, Yetunde Schuhmann appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
Appearing with the Respondent is witness Patricia

EXHR(1) 4 page letter (last page is blank)
9:59am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Continued To Dec-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 10:15am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Sing Lee Laundry & Cleaners, appears through Hongyang Ai; Respondent, Yetunde Schuhmann, appears in Pro Per.
Parties and witnesses previously sworn testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles. (Matter is passed, Appellant briefly left the Courtroom.)
10:55am
Matter is recalled. All present. Appellant informs the Court that he would like a continuance. Respondent argues against a continuance. The Court ordered the matter continued due to good cause, to Dec-03-09, 9:00am. (Judge Myles will allow Ms. Shuhmann to submit evidence by affadavit, rather than witnesses needing to appear, Mr. Hongyang is ordered to bring his witnesses in person, and to bring his own interpreter.) The case will be called first on Dec-03-09. (Stipulation and order for Judge Pro Tem will be filed; parties do not need to sign a new stip & order.)
11:15am
No new evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Judgment Entered
